name: Pets De Soeurs ( Cinnamon Rolls)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Blend in the softened butter; add cinnamon.
3. Gradually incorporate the milk until a soft dough forms.
4. Roll the dough into a fairly thin sheet, slightly thicker than a standard pie crust.
5. Butter the dough and sprinkle with ¼ inch of brown sugar and cinnamon.
6. Roll up the dough like a jelly roll and slice into circles about ½ inch thick.
7. Pour water into a casserole dish.
8. Place the sliced dough into the casserole and bake at 375°F for approximately 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Variation: Cranberry jam may be substituted for the sugar and cinnamon.
